deploy_steps: 1. POST /api/v1/workflows (CREATE NEW workflow, safe per feedback_n8n_no_put_api.md)
3. POST /rest/workflows/{id}/activate with {versionId} via cookie session (per feedback_n8n_draft_active.md)

5. Verify PATCH applied + reprocess_attempts incremented + ai_confidence updated
